description_long: This object consists of two parallel rows of modern lampposts, each row featuring five posts with distinct color schemes: red, green, yellow, black, and gray. Each lamppost has a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a hexagonal base and a geometric lamp head at the top. The lamp heads are either faceted globes or polygonal lanterns, both with a clean, contemporary design. The bases and poles are color-matched, while the lamp heads are primarily white or gray, providing a striking contrast. The arrangement and repetition of the lampposts suggest they are intended for urban environments such as streets, parks, or plazas. No decorative elements or attachments are visible, emphasizing a functional and minimalist aesthetic.
description: A set of ten modern, color-coded lampposts with geometric lamp heads and slender cylindrical poles, arranged in two parallel rows. The design is minimalist and functional, with contrasting white or gray lamp heads atop colored bases and poles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all ten lampposts in two parallel rows, clearly displaying the color variety and geometric lamp head designs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alignment and depth of the lamppost rows, with the lamp heads' shapes and colored bases visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the lamp heads and the color arrangement of the bases and poles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the geometric shapes of the lamp heads and the consistent spacing between the lampposts.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Faceted globe and polygonal lantern with clean, geometric lines and a modern aesthetic
